SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

params.amount: amount of the restake transaction fee to withdraw
params.recipient: recipient of the restake transaction fee

RestakeFeeWithdrawn(address,uint256).notice: emitted when restake transaction fee is withdrawn
